exercises.title: Define a Function
exercises.description: Create function greet() that prints 'Hello, World!'
exercises.explanation: Functions are defined with def and called with parentheses.

exercises.title: Function with Parameters
exercises.description: Create add(a, b) that returns the sum
exercises.expected_answer:
def add(a, b):
    return a + b
exercises.explanation: Parameters are placeholders for values. return sends value back.

exercises.title: Function with Default Parameter
exercises.description: Create power(x, n=2) that returns x to the power of n
exercises.expected_answer:
def power(x, n=2):
    return x ** n
exercises.solution:
def power(x, n=2):
    return x ** n
print(power(3))
print(power(3, 3))
exercises.explanation: Default parameter: n=2 means n defaults to 2 if not provided.

exercises.title: Lambda Function
exercises.description: Create lambda that squares a number
exercises.explanation: Lambda: compact function. lambda x: result
